feedback.text: I have dual citizenship from a French backround living in Canada. Video Games are art, and it is a travesty for hundreds to thousands of hours of work to simply be forgotten because publishers wish us to simply move on to their next product. I humbly request that measures be taken to protect these works that are held dear to most who have grown up with them. Imagine you had a favourite toy as a child, then someday someone shows up and takes it away because they don't want to produce or support it anymore. This is unforgivable from a consumer and ethical standpoint given the amount of dollars we pay for each purchase. I humbly request that action be taken so that publishers cannot remove the products we have purchased, have put time into, and have an emotional attachment with.
